items.name: sagemaker-distribution
items.description: A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

items.name: AI-Enhanced-Intrusion-Detection-System
items.description: An advanced network security framework designed to detect, analyze, and mitigate malicious network activities and potential cyber threats in real time. The system leverages machine learning to improve the accuracy of threat detection, drastically reducing false positives compared to traditional signature-based security systems.

items.name: COF-ML
items.description: Machine learning Classifiers for distinguishing electroactive behavior of Covalent Organic Frameworks for Lithium Ion Batteries.

items.name: TubesDataMining_Kelompok11
items.description: An end-to-end Machine Learning pipeline utilizing Logistic Regression to predict e-commerce customer loyalty tiers. Engineered following the CRISP-DM framework and deployed as a live interactive Streamlit web dashboard.

items.name: DETECTING-ACADEMIC-DISTRESS-WITHOUT-SENSORS-
items.description: Official repository for the Master's thesis "Detecting Distress Without Sensors". A machine learning framework evaluating self-reported physical symptoms as non-intrusive predictors of student psychological distress. Features RFECV, fold-level RFE stability workflows, and RF/LR comparative pipelines under severe class imbalance.

items.name: almos
items.description: ALMOS is an automated machine learning framework for chemical discovery, combining clustering, descriptor generation, and active learning into reproducible workflows accessible via CLI or GUI.

items.name: RNA-Secondary-Structure-Prediction
items.description: Machine learning framework for RNA secondary structure prediction using contact map generation, ViennaRNA benchmarking, and Transformer-based deep learning models.

items.name: MissaouiYassine1
items.description: Computer Engineering student working on machine learning systems, web, and mobile applications. I build end-to-end solutions from data processing and modeling to API deployment, using Python, SQL, FastAPI, Docker, and modern web/mobile frameworks, with a focus on practical, real-world projects.

items.name: Automated-Penetration-Testing-Comparative-Analysis
items.description: A comparative analysis and English translation of research frameworks combining Penetration Testing, Machine Learning, and Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for IoT and Smart City security architectures (University of the Aegean).

items.name: StateCheckpoint.NET
items.description: Universal checkpointing for C# machine learning. Persist full training states (Weights + Optimizer + Hyperparameters) to File System, PostgreSQL, or Cloud Blobs. Manage thousands of models by GUID with zero framework lock-in—built for custom training loops first.

items.name: maila_sdk
items.description: MAILA — a MAchine learning framework for Inferring Latent mental states from digital Activity

items.name: BioGraphX
items.description: BioGraphX is a comprehensive framework for extracting biophysical features from protein sequences using graph-theoretical approaches. The system models proteins as interaction networks where residues form nodes and biochemical interactions form edges, enabling sophisticated feature extraction for downstream machine learning applications

items.description: Deep learning framework for de novo antimicrobial peptide (AMP) discovery using a Variational Autoencoder (VAE), physicochemical feature engineering, and machine learning-based AMP screening.

items.name: TFM_MCD_MarcVelascoMateu
items.description: Machine learning framework for estimating global Surface Water Fraction (SWF) from passive microwave brightness temperatures (WindSat/CIMR). Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.

items.name: credit-tail-analytic
items.description: An end-to-end framework using non-linear time series AI (EGARCH-t) and unsupervised machine learning to predict tail risk and secondary market liquidity shocks in Brazilian corporate bonds (debêntures).

items.description: Large-scale ICU data warehouse and machine learning framework for early sepsis warning, leveraging SQL temporal analytics, Python ETL pipelines, relational database design, and physiological feature engineering across 40,000+ patient records

items.name: Forecasting-Stock-Volatility-using-ML
items.description: To design and implement a robust machine learning framework to forecast one-month-ahead stock volatility using historical price data, enhancing risk assessment capabilities and enabling data-driven portfolio diversification.

items.name: Non-Invasive-Glucose-Estimation-Using-PPG-Signals-and-Machine-Learning
items.description: Machine learning framework for non-invasive blood glucose estimation using Photoplethysmography (PPG) signals, feature engineering, wavelet scattering transform, physiological signal analysis, and XGBoost regression.

items.name: PhosFate
items.description: PhosBind is a machine learning framework that leverages ESM2 protein embeddings to predict and classify anion-binding sites, with a focus on phosphate recognition. It enables data-driven insights into protein–anion interactions for applications in biomolecular design and nutrient recovery.

items.name: autoware-ml
items.description: Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

items.name: nhl-draft-analytics
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting NHL prospect success using historical draft data.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Based-Predictive-Modeling-for-Diabetes-Screening
items.description: 5-year diabetes risk prediction using LightGBM (selected after rigorous model evaluation) paired with SHAP, PDP, and ICE frameworks to extract transparent, clinically actionable thresholds.

items.name: fairops
items.description: A comprehensive and extensible ontology for systematically modeling fairness notions, metrics, biases, evaluation methods, and scientific provenance in machine learning. This ontology provides researchers, developers, and practitioners with a unified, machine-readable framework to guide the design and assessment of fair ML systems.

items.name: Polar-Climate-Effect-on-Indian-Climate
items.description: Polar India Climate is a machine learning framework for examining how shifts in polar climate may be altering India’s monsoons, sea level rise, and heat waves by combining climate data with models such as Random Forest and LSTM.

items.name: Estimating-the-Probability-of-Habitable-Exoplanets-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: An end-to-end Machine Learning pipeline utilizing specialized ensemble methods to analyze and predict exoplanet habitability from planetary and stellar data. This project implements advanced handling of extreme class imbalances (~1.25% minority class presence) to build a robust framework for astrobiological statistical inference.

items.name: PsycheGraph-XAI
items.description: An Explainable Artificial Intelligence Framework for Student Depression Risk Prediction using Machine Learning, SHAP Explainability, Gemini-powered Reasoning, and Evidence-Based Recommendations.

items.name: World-Development-Indicators
items.description: Built the Metamorphosis Development Index, a PCA-based framework for measuring multidimensional development across 170+ countries using World Bank indicators. Developed predictive models using machine learning/NLP techniques to forecast future development scores and created an interactive Streamlit dashboard for visualizations and predictions

items.name: MatPropNet
items.description: Machine learning and graph neural network framework for materials property prediction using JARVIS-DFT, matminer, XGBoost, and PyTorch Geometric.

items.name: Deep-learning-projects
items.description: Hands-on deep learning projects using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and modern machine learning frameworks.

items.name: World-cup-2026-Machine-Learning-predictor
items.description: A machine learning framework to simulate and predict the 2026 FIFA World Cup tournament from the group stage to the final.

items.name: Multimodal-Machine-Learning-for-Early-Detection-of-Major-Depressive-Disorder-MDD-Prof.-Hamim-Zafar
items.description: Leakage-aware multimodal ML framework for MDD detection from multi-site fMRI/sMRI (REST-meta-MDD, 2380 subjects, 25 sites). Late-fusion of functional connectivity + VBM with SVM, XGBoost & GNN baselines. LOSO validation, ComBat harmonization, HAMD severity regression, Haufe-transformed biomarker maps.

items.name: miceLLC
items.description: miceLLC is a rapid and cost-effective machine learning–aided framework for pre-clinical screening of potent compounds and drugs against the Lewis Lung Cancer (LLC) Cell Line.

items.name: AI-Job-Market-Forecasting-Model-Using-Linear-Regression
items.description: This machine learning project implements a Linear Regression model to analyze AI industry trends. By evaluating historical data across fifty records with structural accuracy, it maps the direct correlation between professional experience and salary packages. The system establishes a perfect zero-error predictive framework for market forecasting.

items.name: Quantum-Breast-Cancer-Detection-Using-Quantum-Classifiers
items.description: A Quantum Machine Learning framework for breast cancer detection and classification using Variational Quantum Classifiers, Quantum SVMs, and adaptive noise-aware quantum learning.

items.name: Gold-Price-Prediction
items.description: A machine learning-based framework for analyzing historical gold price trends and forecasting future gold prices through data preprocessing, feature engineering, visualization, and model evaluation.

items.name: Manufacturing-Automotive---Contextual-Predictive-Maintenance-IoT-Edge-AI-
items.description: Developed a predictive maintenance framework by fusing IoT sensor data (vibration, current, temperature) with external factors such as weather, traffic, and operational load. Applied ensemble machine learning models to predict equipment failures early, reducing downtime and maintenance costs while improving system reliability.

items.name: Proactive-ML-IOT-Framework-Aquaculture
items.description: Python-driven framework that integrates machine learning and IoT telemetry to enable predictive monitoring, proactive decision-making, and data-informed automation in aquaculture environments.

items.name: digital-phenotyping-mental-health
items.description: Digital phenotyping framework for depression risk prediction using NHANES data, integrating statistical analysis, machine learning, SHAP explainability, and equity-aware population health insights.

items.name: A-Reliability-Aware-and-Explainable-Framework-for-Traffic-Severity-Prediction
items.description: Machine learning framework for traffic risk prediction and reliability-aware safety interpretation using large-scale accident data.

items.name: Beam-Column-Joint-ML
items.description: Repository for a machine learning framework and proposed empirical equation to predict reinforced concrete beam–column joint shear strength. Includes trained models, experimental dataset, and feature analysis for interpretable, practical joint shear assessment.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Based-Malware-Detection-with-Feature-Influence-Techniques-for-Low-Resource-Devices
items.description: This repository contains the research and implementation for a master's thesis proposing an efficient malware detection framework designed for resource-constrained environments.

items.name: fairness-audit-playbook
items.description: Framework for identifying, measuring, and documenting fairness risks in machine learning systems.

items.name: MLFromCore
items.description: A growing machine learning framework built entirely from scratch in pure Python — no external libraries such as NumPy or scikit-learn.  The goal is to deeply understand how machine learning algorithms work internally by implementing them from first principles.

items.name: CFST-Capacity-Prediction
items.description: A robust machine learning framework for predicting the axial load capacity of Concrete-Filled Steel Tubular (CFST) columns. The project utilizes XGBoost optimized with Optuna and provides interpretability via SHAP values to analyze feature importance compared to existing benchmarks.

items.name: refiner
items.description: Refiner by Macrodata Labs, a data processing framework for Machine Learning large scale datasets

items.name: gradient-descent-from-scratch
items.description: Implementation of gradient descent optimization algorithm without machine learning frameworks.

items.name: ML-based-Algorithmic-Trading-System
items.description: Design and evaluate a machine learning-based algorithmic trading system that leverages historical equity market data and technical indicators to generate profitable trading signals and automatically execute trades using a backtesting framework.

items.name: synscreen-eval
items.description: BioGuard-Eval: DNA Synthesis Screening & Adversarial Evals. Implements machine learning, and biological safety safeguards. Builds a simulation of DNA Synthesis Screening (filtering regulated biological threats) and an Adversarial Evaluation Framework, stress-testing filters against obfuscation attacks like codon optimization and sequence splitting.

items.name: novel-ml-method-climate-change-prediction
items.description: Novel geospatial machine learning framework that runs 100k+ combinatorial scenario projections across IPCC climate pathways, using model ensembles and out-of-distribution validation.

items.name: single-cell-concept-interpretability
items.description: A rigorous evaluation framework for interpretable machine learning in single-cell transcriptomics.

items.name: reassessment-aleatoric-uncertainty
items.description: A theoretical and empirical re-assessment of aleatoric uncertainty in machine learning. Introduces a formal framework that decomposes aleatoric uncertainty into measurable components and demonstrates that a substantial portion of traditionally “irreducible” uncertainty can be systematically reduced.

items.name: Comparative-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Binary-Bioactivity-Classification-of-Drug-Like-Compounds
items.description: This project implements a machine learning pipeline for binary classification of drug-like compounds using ChEMBL bioactivity data. Features include molecular descriptors and fingerprints. Models such as SVM, RF, KNN, CNN, and SNN are evaluated, with classical methods achieving the best performance.

items.name: HYBRID-TRANSFORMER-BASED-CROSS-LINGUAL-MISINFORMATION-DETECTION
items.description: Hybrid Transformer-Based Cross-Lingual Misinformation Detection combines XLM-RoBERTa with Machine Learning models (LinearSVC, Logistic Regression, Naïve Bayes) to detect fake news across English, Arabic, Hindi, and Kurdish. The hybrid ensemble framework improves multilingual understanding, accuracy, and robustness.

items.name: AutoQuant
items.description: Automation framework for machine learning, forecasting, model evaluation, and interpretation.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: Student-Success-Intelligence-System
items.description: A data-driven framework for understanding and predicting academic outcomes using statistical analysis, machine learning, and data storytelling.

items.name: FACIAL-EMOTION-ANALYSIS-FOR-DRUG-USE-DETECTION-USING-MACHINE-LEARNING
items.description: A non-invasive AI framework using CNNs to identify early signs of substance abuse from visual cues. The system analyzes facial expressions and classifies images into 'Addicted' or 'Not Addicted' based on emotional distress patterns. Optimized with data augmentation and deep learning for scalable, real-world deployment.

items.name: DeepGNN
items.description: DeepGNN is a framework for training machine learning models on large scale graph data.

items.name: Minerva
items.description: Minerva is a framework for training machine learning models for researchers.

items.name: freight-rail-delay-prediction
items.description: This project investigates short-term arrival delay time prediction in freight rail operations using historical operational datasets and machine learning models. The framework captures delay propagation patterns to enhance prediction accuracy, improve operational efficiency, and assist decision-making in freight rail network management.

items.name: Pancreatic-Cancer-Global-Clinical---Risk-Factor
items.description: Pancreatic Cancer Predictive Pipeline  A professional clinical framework for pancreatic cancer prognosis. Combines Kaplan-Meier survival analysis and Cox Regression with an MLOps-powered machine learning pipeline (XGBoost/Random Forest) for real-time, high-recall patient risk stratification.

items.name: explainable-anomaly-detection
items.description: An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for High-Scale Anomaly Detection in Imbalanced Data Systems.

items.name: Airline-passenger-Predictive-Analytics
items.description: A machine learning and time-series forecasting project built clean, preprocess, and model historical aviation data. Using a Seasonal Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average (SARIMA) framework, this project captures long-term trends and recurring monthly seasonal patterns to forecast future airline passenger volume with a high degree of precision.

items.name: A-Data-driven-framework-for-women-s-safety-using-Ml-algorithms
items.description: A machine learning and Django-based web application for analyzing and predicting crime trends against women using historical crime data, supporting data-driven safety insights and decision-making.

items.name: crc-progression-classification-ML-framework
items.description: A Cohort-Aware Machine Learning Framework for Multiclass Classification of Colorectal Disease Progression Using Clinical Features and Microbial Taxa Diversity and Gene Richness Across Healthy, Adenoma, and CRC States

items.name: ICDAM-2026-Conference-Paper-Presentation-Certificate
items.description: Proud to have presented our research paper, "SmartFlow: A Multimodal Machine Learning Framework for Menstrual Cycle Phase Detection Using Physiological and Symptom-Based Data," at ICDAM 2026. Completed under the guidance of Dr. Khushboo Tripathi at Sharda University, this work reflects my passion for AI, ML, and healthcare innovation.

items.name: Predicting-30-Day-Hospital-Readmission-in-Diabetic-Patients
items.description: Predicting 30-Day Hospital Readmission in Diabetic Patients A Nested Cross-Validated, Calibrated Machine Learning Framework with DeLong Statistical Comparison and SHAP Explainability

items.description: Multimodal machine learning framework for detecting financial fraud in listed companies using numerical financial features, textual disclosures, PCA, Word2Vec, and SCO-MRBM classification.

items.name: explainable-ai-network-config-validation
items.description: Explainable AI-based framework for detecting risky cross-device IP configuration inconsistencies using rule-based validation, machine learning, and XAI techniques.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Based-Bitcoin-Volatility-Prediction-System
items.description: Developed an early-warning framework to predict high-volatility Bitcoin days using technical, sentiment, and macrofinancial data from 2018–2024. Engineered 26 features and compared Random Forest, LSTM, and hybrid LSTM–Random Forest models using timeseries data splitting and F2-score optimization.

items.name: fedlearner
items.description: A multi-party collaborative machine learning framework

items.name: ScorchAI
items.description: A hybrid machine learning and LLM agent framework for weather-driven solar output prediction. Combines geospatial satellite data and Bureau of Meteorology weather records to generate daily solar yield estimates with calibrated confidence scores, accessible through a natural-language Q&A interface built on Claude Haiku 4.5 and FastAPI.

items.name: Data-Science-AI-Project
items.description: Collection of Data Science, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Artificial Intelligence projects using Python, SQL, Power BI, and modern AI frameworks.

items.name: time-series-ml
items.description: A time-series machine learning framework for predicting next-day stock price direction using multiple models, including XGBoost, Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and LightGBM. The framework currently focuses on the China A-share market, using data from the market-data-platform A-share data lake.
